title: significantly optimized
description:
A potato PC? Or maybe some older hardware? Dealing with lag, low frame rates, or random lag spikes? No worries, I'm here to help! :)

This modepack aims for great performance and is built to make Minecraft run smoothly, even on pc from ancient times :)
body: A significantly optimized Minecraft modpack is a curated collection of performance-focused mods designed to dramatically boost your Frame Rate Per Second (FPS) and reduce lag, making the game much smoother, especially on older hardware. Instead of just one big mod, these packs bundle things like Sodium (for rendering optimization), Lithium (for game logic/server-side improvements) and etc together,This mode essentially replace the need for just OptiFine, offering superior performance while keeping the core vanilla look.The goal is to let you play Minecraft comfortably without feeling like you're running it on a "toaster." YT -https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCn_fbXuAPSqiuQdA4I4ahjg
